'''fogakaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabproof|stabproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabproof|stabproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fogakaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogakithi|fogakithi]] || [[word:fogakiji|fogakiji]] || [[word:fogakishi|fogakishi]] || [[word:fogakiki|fogakiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogakuthuthu|fogakuthuthu]] || [[word:fogakujuju|fogakujuju]] || [[word:fogakushushu|fogakushushu]] || [[word:fogakukuku|fogakukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogakuthu|fogakuthu]] || [[word:fogakuju|fogakuju]] || [[word:fogakushu|fogakushu]] || [[word:fogakuku|fogakuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogakufthuf|fogakufthuf]] || [[word:fogakufjuf|fogakufjuf]] || [[word:fogakufshuf|fogakufshuf]] || [[word:fogakufkuf|fogakufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogakethe|fogakethe]] || [[word:fogakeje|fogakeje]] || [[word:fogakeshe|fogakeshe]] || [[word:fogakeke|fogakeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogakothotho|fogakothotho]] || [[word:fogakojojo|fogakojojo]] || [[word:fogakoshosho|fogakoshosho]] || [[word:fogakokoko|fogakokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogakotho|fogakotho]] || [[word:fogakojo|fogakojo]] || [[word:fogakosho|fogakosho]] || [[word:fogakoko|fogakoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogakofthof|fogakofthof]] || [[word:fogakofjof|fogakofjof]] || [[word:fogakofshof|fogakofshof]] || [[word:fogakofkof|fogakofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfthÃŸf|fogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfjÃŸf|fogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfshÃŸf|fogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfkÃŸf|fogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fogakÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fogakÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fogakÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fogakÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfthÃŸf|fogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfjÃŸf|fogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfshÃŸf|fogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfkÃŸf|fogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfthÃŸf|fogakÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfjÃŸf|fogakÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfshÃŸf|fogakÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fogakÃŸfkÃŸf|fogakÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fogakÃḊthÃḊ|fogakÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fogakÃḊjÃḊ|fogakÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fogakÃḊshÃḊ|fogakÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fogakÃḊkÃḊ|fogakÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fogakathatha|fogakathatha]] || [[word:fogakajaja|fogakajaja]] || [[word:fogakashasha|fogakashasha]] || [[word:fogakakaka|fogakakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fogakatha|fogakatha]] || [[word:fogakaja|fogakaja]] || [[word:fogakasha|fogakasha]] || [[word:fogakaka|fogakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fogakafthaf|fogakafthaf]] || [[word:fogakafjaf|fogakafjaf]] || [[word:fogakafshaf|fogakafshaf]] || [[word:fogakafkaf|fogakafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fogakasha|fogakasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogakshÃḋsha|fogakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogakrosha|fogakrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogakmusha|fogakmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogakyasha|fogakyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogaknkshÃḋsha|gofogaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogaknkrosha|gofogaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogaknkmusha|gofogaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogaknkyasha|gofogaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fogagakasha|fogagakasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogagakshÃḋsha|fogagakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogagakrosha|fogagakrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogagakmusha|fogagakmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogagakyasha|fogagakyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogagaknkshÃḋsha|gofogagaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogagaknkrosha|gofogagaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogagaknkmusha|gofogagaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogagaknkyasha|gofogagaknkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fegÃḊkasha|fegÃḊkasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fegÃḊkshÃḋsha|fegÃḊkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fegÃḊkrosha|fegÃḊkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fegÃḊkmusha|fegÃḊkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fegÃḊkyasha|fegÃḊkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofegÃḊknkshÃḋsha|gofegÃḊknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofegÃḊknkrosha|gofegÃḊknkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofegÃḊknkmusha|gofegÃḊknkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofegÃḊknkyasha|gofegÃḊknkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fogfakasha|fogfakasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fogfakshÃḋsha|fogfakshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fogfakrosha|fogfakrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fogfakmusha|fogfakmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fogfakyasha|fogfakyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofogfaknkshÃḋsha|gofogfaknkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofogfaknkrosha|gofogfaknkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofogfaknkmusha|gofogfaknkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofogfaknkyasha|gofogfaknkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
